summary: Specialized Gameplay Programmer. Built production-grade combat systems, multiplayer architectures (EOS/Netcode), and player-centric mechanics using Unreal Engine 5 (C++/Blueprints). Proven expertise in systems design, state management, and performant gameplay at scale.

experience.title: Game Developer (Unreal Engine)
details: Designed, developed, and maintained gameplay systems using Unreal Engine 5 leveraging C++ and Blueprints for scalable and maintainable code.
Developed multiplayer networking features including server–client architecture, actor replication, RPCs, and session management.
Created AI systems for enemies and NPCs using Behavior Trees, State Machines, and custom Unreal AI logic.
Built reusable tools and gameplay components to improve iteration speed and support designer-driven workflows.

experience.title: Game Developer (Unity Engine)
details: Developed and maintained gameplay systems in Unity (C#) for a 2D slime platformer and a word game, implementing core mechanics, progression, and game states.
Built UI and interaction systems using Unity UI and TextMeshPro including scoring, feedback, and player progression features.
Optimized and refactored gameplay code for performance, stability, and maintainability, collaborating remotely with designers and artists via version control.

experience.title: Extern (Mobalytics)
details: Completed a remote externship gaining hands-on exposure to game analytics, market research, and player behavior analysis.
Conducted an in-depth genre-focused analysis evaluating core game mechanics, KPIs, monetization models, and player psychology.
Synthesized research findings into a structured presentation with actionable recommendations on market expansion and design opportunities.

projects.title: Realm Rival
projects.description: Unreal Engine gameplay project focused on competitive mechanics, responsive combat flow, and moment-to-moment action polish.

projects.title: Word Dash
projects.description: Unreal Engine 5.5 multiplayer word game built primarily in Blueprints, featuring session-based gameplay, data-driven word systems, and a full menu-to-match flow.

projects.title: Legend of Indra vs Vritrasur
projects.description: A long-form action-adventure RPG built in Unreal Engine 5, inspired by the ancient Hindu epic. I served as both Game Designer and Developer on this project, responsible for the combat system, enemy AI, narrative flow, and environment design.

projects.title: Isles Of Echoes On Cybertrom
projects.description: Sci-fi Unreal project emphasizing mission scripting, traversal mechanics, and immersive world interaction.

projects.title: Reality Run
projects.description: Unreal runner-style prototype with dynamic obstacles, smooth movement handling, and gameplay pacing systems.

projects.title: Rewind Component System
projects.description: Blueprint-based Unreal Engine 5.4 third-person prototype focused on a time-rewind gameplay mechanic with integrated movement, combat, UI hints, and visual-audio feedback.

projects.title: Prototype For RPG Game
projects.description: Unreal RPG prototype exploring character progression, interaction architecture, and modular gameplay components.

projects.title: Lost Cure
projects.description: Narrative-focused Unreal project featuring objective-driven gameplay, environmental storytelling, and tension-building systems.

projects.title: It's Me Pico
projects.description: Unity 2023 competitive territory-control mobile game with tile ownership mechanics, adaptive AI, quest systems, daily rewards, and complete monetization integration for shipped mobile gameplay.

projects.title: Slimey Jump
projects.description: Unity 6 vertical endless platformer with drag-jump mechanics, procedural generation, card-based progression, quest system, shop economy, live leaderboards, and hybrid idle mode with offline progression.

projects.title: Bubble Trap
projects.description: Unity 6 2D action-platformer with bubble-based combat mechanics, enemy AI systems, reward-driven progression, and multi-level gameplay across three playable levels.

projects.title: Word Game
projects.description: Location-themed word puzzle game combining core word mechanics with meta progression, economy systems, room interactions, NPC dialogue, and collectible rewards in a travel-based experience.

projects.title: Surprise Sprint
projects.description: Dynamic Unity 6 endless runner with procedurally generated platforms, power-up systems, event-driven architecture, and persistent progression via PlayerPrefs.
